meta.question: What error buget elements contribute to the Pupil Alignmnet Error Budget?
meta.finalAnswer: While the "Pupil Alignment Error Budget" package was identified in the model, no specific error budget elements could be retrieved as its direct children or members using standard SysML ownership predicates. Therefore, it is not possible to list the specific elements that contribute to this error budget based on the current model data.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Pupil Alignment Error Budget")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Pupil")))
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found the Pupil Alignment Error Budget element. Now need to map its properties to see how it relates to other elements.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::10%2520Analysis::Roll-up%2520Analyses::Error%2520Budgets::Pupil%2520Alignment%2520Error%2520Budget> ?prop ?value .
}
GROUP BY ?prop
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25
